metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for Primary Venture Partners. Internal workflows, automation, and AI-assisted tools for the Primary team.

plugins.name: primary-sourcing
plugins.description: Team-wide sourcing agent. Scaffold a portfolio company project, kick off role searches, automate LinkedIn sourcing with per-user dedup, and collect feedback through Slack.

plugins.name: affinity-crm
plugins.description: Single affinity-expert skill for Primary's Affinity MCP — load before pipeline, search, notes, or list tools. Workflow chains and error handling beyond raw tool descriptions.

plugins.name: self-hosted
plugins.description: Manage Primary's self-hosted open-source infrastructure on Hetzner Cloud. GitLab administration, backups, upgrades, user management, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: Team skills for Primary's GitLab instance. Monitor CI/CD pipelines, trigger deploys, manage variables, migrate repos from GitHub, and set up local GitLab tooling.
